experiences.title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER
description: Collaborated closely with Project Managers and Designers to define user stories and acceptance criteria, ensuring a user-centered approach throughout the development lifecycle.
Championed user experience (UI/UX) best practices within the team, resulting in a more intuitive and accessible product for our users.
Contributed to the development and ongoing maintenance of CI/CD pipelines, thereby automating the build, testing, and deployment processes for enhanced efficiency.
Translated intricate client requirements into clear and concise technical specifications and subsequently implemented robust and scalable solutions.
Proactively identified and addressed potential technical challenges that arose during the development process, effectively ensuring that project timelines were consistently met.
Communicated effectively and regularly with clients to provide comprehensive updates on project progress and to actively gather valuable feedback for continuous improvement.

experiences.title: INTERN
description: Assisted in the development of the front-end using React and Typescript for a file management system, comparable to Google Drive, for a client in Japan
